intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 75%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 0% complete. Rep 1/1. 75% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 75% for 10:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into session. 75%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/5. Fresh legs lie to you — they say this is easy. By rep 3 you'll know the truth.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First interval: 5:00 at 108-108% FTP. Seated. Focus on pacing, not heroics.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: After this recovery, you have 5min at 108%. One interval at a time. Focus here first.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/5. Your legs feel good. Enjoy it. By rep 3 they'll be filing a formal complaint.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First interval: 5:00 at 108-108%. Settle in, don't overcook it.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 4:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/5. 55% FTP, Seated. 4:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 55% for 4:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 24% into session. 55%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 2/5. You're 31% through. The pain hasn't peaked yet. Save nothing.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 2/5. You're building something real here. 3 more opportunities to get stronger.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Set 2/5. The suffering is progressive, like a tax bracket.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 31% complete. Rep 2/5. Fatigue is real — hold form. 108%, 95-100 rpm.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 4:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 39% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 55%, 85-95 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 45% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 5:00 at 108%. Then 4:00 rest. Pace yourself for repeatability.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 45% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 45% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 45% done. 108% for 5:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 4:00 at 55%. This hurts because it's supposed to. Set the tone.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 55% × 4:00. Then 24min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First rep. Your legs feel fresh. Check back in 4:00.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 55% × 4:00. Seated, 85-95 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 5/5. Everything you have left. Leave nothing for the cooldown.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 60% complete. 108% for 5:00. Fatigue is real — maintain 90-100 rpm, don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 37 minutes of work done. 19 to go. You're right where you need to be.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 60% done. Your legs are questioning your life choices. Tell them to shut up.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 4/5. You've accumulated 15min of hard work. Quality over quantity from here.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 42 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 20min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 42 minutes of work done. 15 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 42 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 15 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: This is harder than the last one. That's the point. Rep 5/5.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Last rep. 108-108% FTP, 90-100 rpm. Seated. Finish strong, then 10 minutes easy.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Last one. Everything you have. Then you're done and you'll be stronger for it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final rep. Your FTP is filing for protective custody. Ignore it. 5:00 and done.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 108% × 5:00. Then 10min cooldown. Leave nothing.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 83% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 60% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 83% through. This is your workout. Own it. 60% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 83% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 0 minutes total. You've got this.
